stem: In the linear function h, h(20) = 12 and h(18) = 17. Which equation defines h?
rationale: Choice B is correct. Slope = (17 - 12)/(18 - 20) = 5/(-2) = -5/2. Using h(20) = 12 in h(x) = -5/2 x + b: 12 = -5/2 (20) + b = -50 + b, so b = 62. Therefore h(x) = -5/2 x + 62. Choice A uses the reciprocal slope. Choice C has the wrong sign on the slope. Choice D uses h(18) as the y-intercept instead of computing b correctly.
